findings.title: Brand Identity Evolution (Orange)
findings.evidence: Migrated from #0066FF to #FF6B00/ #FF9F0A. Semantic tokens --accent and --accent-rgb updated in globals.css.
findings.impact: Increased visual energy and alignment with industrial safety/premium engineering aesthetics.

findings.title: System-Wide Token Integrity
findings.evidence: Grep search confirmed no hardcoded blue values remain in src/. All components consume semantic variables.
findings.impact: Maintenance cost reduced; design system consistency preserved.

recommendations.action: Audit SVG assets for hardcoded strokes that might still use blue.
recommendations.expected_outcome: Total visual synchronization across all asset types.
